business_description: Teleca is an Australian toll-free number provider (1300, 1800, virtual local, mobile-masking). Inbound receptionist style: answers customer calls about new numbers, existing-account admin, billing, tech support, and warm-transfers to named staff (Simon, Jess, Sales, Accounts).

intents.label: New number
intents.description: Prospect researching or wanting to get a new 1300/1800/virtual local number

intents.label: Port in/out
intents.description: Caller has an existing number elsewhere and wants to move it

intents.label: Account / settings
intents.description: Existing customer wants to change something — forwarding, IVR, voicemail, contact details, plan upgrade, contract changes

intents.label: Billing
intents.description: Invoice request, payment problems, overdue, refund, per-minute rate query

intents.label: Tech support
intents.description: Something's broken — calls not connecting, IVR loop, fault report, voicemail not arriving

intents.label: Speak to a person
intents.description: Specifically asked for Simon / Mel / Anna / Sales / Accounts / the manager

intents.label: Wrong number
intents.description: Not a real customer — wrong number, spam, hostile

outcomes.label: Numbers link sent
outcomes.description: Agent triggered telecaSendNumberInfo — caller got SMS with numbers page + signup link

outcomes.label: Support video sent
outcomes.description: Agent triggered telecaSendSMS — caller got SMS with a video tutorial

outcomes.label: Transferred
outcomes.description: Warm transfer succeeded — caller is now with a human

outcomes.label: Transfer failed
outcomes.description: Transfer attempted but didn't complete (no answer, dropped, busy)

outcomes.label: Info resolved
outcomes.description: Caller's question answered without an SMS or transfer

outcomes.label: Message taken
outcomes.description: Caller asked the team to call them back; agent captured the message

outcomes.label: Abandoned
outcomes.description: Caller hung up before agent could finish

outcomes.label: Needs review
outcomes.description: Agent couldn't categorize. Should be near-zero in a healthy system; auto-flags for human review
